subject: Unable to reset my password
description: I requested a password reset email, but I have not received the reset link.
agent_response: Please check your spam folder and confirm that you used the registered email. You can request another reset link from the sign-in page.

subject: Refund request for recent order
description: I purchased an item twelve days ago and would like to return it for a refund.
agent_response: Your purchase is within the 30-day refund period. Please submit the return request from your order page.

subject: Order delivery is delayed
description: The tracking information has not changed for four days and my order has not arrived.
agent_response: We will verify the carrier tracking information and open an investigation because there has been no update for more than 72 hours.

subject: Duplicate charge on my card
description: My bank statement shows two charges for the same purchase.
agent_response: We will compare the two transaction identifiers to determine whether one charge is a temporary authorization.

subject: My account is locked
description: I entered the wrong password several times and can no longer sign in.
agent_response: Please wait fifteen minutes and retry, or use the password reset option. Manual unlocking requires identity verification.

subject: Cancel my subscription
description: I want to stop the next subscription renewal.
agent_response: You can cancel from the billing settings page. Access will remain active until the end of the current billing period.

subject: Change delivery address
description: I entered the wrong address and need to change it before the order ships.
agent_response: We can update the address if the order has not entered fulfillment. Please provide the order number.

subject: Lost access to authenticator app
description: I replaced my phone and cannot access my two-factor authentication codes.
agent_response: Try again later.

subject: API returns HTTP 429
description: Our integration frequently receives HTTP 429 responses from the API.
agent_response: Implement exponential backoff and inspect the rate-limit response headers before retrying requests.

subject: Request account data export
description: I want to download a copy of all personal information stored in my account.
agent_response: Submit the request from the privacy settings page. Account verification is required, and processing may take up to thirty days.
